scripts.build:css: cp -r node_modules/@fortawesome/fontawesome-free/webfonts public/webfonts && cp -r node_modules/flag-icons/flags public/flags && sass ./app/assets/stylesheets/cssbundling.sass.scss:./app/assets/builds/cssbundling.css --no-source-map --load-path=node_modules --quiet-deps --silence-deprecation=import && sass ./app/assets/stylesheets/active_admin.scss:./app/assets/builds/active_admin.css --no-source-map --load-path=$(bundle show activeadmin)/app/assets/stylesheets --quiet-deps --silence-deprecation=import && sass ./app/assets/stylesheets/mailer.sass:./app/assets/builds/mailer.css --no-source-map --quiet-deps --silence-deprecation=import
